name: Olark
description:
Olark provides reputation management services through its customizable and feature-rich chatbot features and helps brands and multi-location businesses maintain their online presence. 

Source: G2

Features: 

‍

➡️Offers live-chat feature to gather feedback from customers in real-time 

➡️Allows you to organize feedback as structured notes and chat transcripts in your CRM to help you make informed decisions and understand your customers better

➡️They help generate insights from these live chats and help you better understand what your customers require from you. 

Benefits: 

✅Offers intuitive chat-bot features 

✅Helpful Customer Service 

✅In-depth surveys after completion of your conversation with the customer 

✅Easy to use interface 

Cons: 

❌ Does not offer review generation or review monitoring services 

❌Is mostly chat-bot based and lacks a lot of features

❌Allows very less integrations as mostly is a chat-bot based reputation management software
what_people_say:
Likes:

“With Olark, now we can have real-time chats with our website visitors who some turn to be customers. I am glad of what Olark can do when implemented and we have also noticed an increase in sales since our customer team is actively talking to customers on our website. The other good thing for using Olark is that it is easy to integrate to WordPress and other software we are using.”

‍

Dislikes: 

“The monthly subscription fee can make someone stop using Olark, especially for small startups like ours. I wish they could have a free package so that people who cannot afford the monthly subscription fee can still benefit from one of the best chat apps for a website.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
